body.value: @concat('{"src":"', if(equals(pipeline().parameters.sourceFolderPath, '/'), concat('/', item().name), concat(pipeline().parameters.sourceFolderPath, '/', item().name)), '","dst":"', if(equals(pipeline().parameters.destFolderPath, '/'), concat('/', item().name), concat(pipeline().parameters.destFolderPath, '/', item().name)), '","depth":', string(add(pipeline().parameters.currentDepth, 1)), '}', uriComponentToString('%0A'))
